hero.title: Automate repetitive tasks with Python in minutes
hero.subtitle: Create powerful automations, bots, and workflows without leaving your browser. Pytomatiza+ turns complex Python scripting into visual, manageable processes.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to automate anything

step1.title: Create Your Automation
step1.description: Describe what you need in natural language or use our visual builder. Our AI engine interprets your requirements and generates the perfect automation script.

step2.title: Configure Parameters
step2.description: Fine-tune inputs, connect APIs, set schedules, and define conditions. Every parameter is customizable to match your exact workflow needs.

step3.title: Execute & Monitor
step3.description: Run your automation instantly or schedule it. Monitor execution in real-time, review logs, and get instant notifications on completion.

features.title: Everything You Need to Automate
features.subtitle: A complete platform for building, running, and monitoring automations

feature1.title: Python Automations
feature1.description: Write or generate Python scripts for any task. File processing, data transformation, API calls â€” all automated.

feature2.title: Integrations
feature2.description: Connect with Google Drive, Gmail, Google Sheets, and hundreds of APIs. Your tools, unified in one platform.

feature3.title: Smart Scheduling
feature3.description: Set precise schedules, recurring intervals, or trigger-based execution. Your automations run exactly when you need them.

feature4.title: Real-time Monitoring
feature4.description: Watch executions live, track performance metrics, and receive alerts. Complete visibility into every automation.

feature5.title: Complete Audit Logs
feature5.description: Every execution is logged with full details. Review, debug, and optimize your automations with comprehensive audit trails.

feature6.title: Built to Scale
feature6.description: From small tasks to enterprise workflows. Pytomatiza+ handles increased load without compromising performance.

demo.title: See It in Action
demo.subtitle: A visual platform designed for productivity

useCases.title: Automate Anything
useCases.subtitle: From simple tasks to complex enterprise workflows

case1.title: Financial Automation
case1.description: Automate invoice processing, expense tracking, bank reconciliation, and financial report generation.

case2.title: Report Automation
case2.description: Generate and distribute automated reports from any data source. Scheduled, formatted, and delivered on time.

case3.title: Email Automation
case3.description: Automate email campaigns, notification sequences, attachment processing, and intelligent inbox management.

case4.title: API Automation
case4.description: Orchestrate multi-step API workflows. Connect services, transform data, and automate complex integrations.

case5.title: Spreadsheet Automation
case5.description: Process, transform, and analyze spreadsheet data automatically. Generate pivot tables, charts, and summaries.

case6.title: Business Process Automation
case6.description: Automate approval workflows, data entry, document processing, and compliance reporting for your entire organization.

cta.title: Start Automating Today
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of professionals who have transformed their workflow with Pytomatiza+
